title: Preview
description:
A collection of rich text that will be displayed as a preview to another app.

This is read-only except for a small group of whitelisted apps.

fallback.description: Some fallback text to display if unable to display the full preview.

footer.description: Text to display in the footer.

header.description: Text to display in the header.

header_link.description: Where the header will link to.

html_text.description: HTML formatted text for the body of the preview.

text.description: Text for the body of the preview.

title.description: Text to display as the title.

title_link.description: Where to title will link to.
